Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 67aca1fcc6bed20794832decdba590a758d67d8f by Oleg Drokin

Patch Set 2:

In fact this patch is not enough.
Problem hit before this code reach.

readahead had found a lock for offset, but this lock ins't hold any reference and revoked during bl ast processing. It caused a error 
[ 948.992534] LustreError: 15326:0:(osc_object.c:413:osc_req_attr_set()) uncovered page!

with additional delays/debug enabled.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> In fact this patch is not enough.
> Problem hit before this code reach.
> 
> readahead had found a lock for offset, but this lock ins't hold any reference and revoked during bl ast processing. It caused a error 
> [ 948.992534] LustreError: 15326:0:(osc_object.c:413:osc_req_attr_set()) uncovered page!
> 
> with additional delays/debug enabled.

Do you have a solution to that?

commit.subject: LU-16160 osc: take ldlm lock when queue sync pages
commit.message:
LU-16160 osc: take ldlm lock when queue sync pages

osc_queue_sync_pages() add osc_extent to osc_object's IO extent
list without taking ldlm locks, and then it calls
osc_io_unplug_async() to queue the IO work for the client.

This patch make sync page queuing take ldlm lock in the
osc_extent.

Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Idefa2981e62a2a6e10d8b8a7692c0337b61b9052
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/48557
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
